title: Determine if Two Events Have Conflict
titleCn: 判断两个事件是否存在冲突

testcases.input: event1 = ["01:15","02:00"], event2 = ["02:00","03:00"] Output: true Explanation: The two events intersect at time 2:00.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The two events intersect at time 2:00.

testcases.input: event1 = ["01:00","02:00"], event2 = ["01:20","03:00"] Output: true Explanation: The two events intersect starting from 01:20 to 02:00.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The two events intersect starting from 01:20 to 02:00.

testcases.input: event1 = ["10:00","11:00"], event2 = ["14:00","15:00"] Output: false Explanation: The two events do not intersect.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The two events do not intersect.
